name: Charles Bridge
description: Charles Bridge is one of Prague's most recognizable public spaces and works well for sunrise or sunset visits.

name: Prague Castle
description: Prague Castle offers a large hilltop complex with churches, courtyards, and broad views over the city.

name: Colosseum
description: The Colosseum is a foundational Rome stop and a clear example of demand-heavy attractions.

name: Trevi Fountain
description: Trevi Fountain is a free high-traffic stop that fits naturally into central Rome walking plans.

name: Marienplatz
description: Marienplatz is the practical starting point for exploring Munich's old town and surrounding streets.

name: Nymphenburg Palace
description: Nymphenburg Palace pairs formal architecture with broad grounds and a calmer pace than the city center.

name: Sagrada Familia
description: Sagrada Familia is one of Europe's most distinctive works of architecture and a strong interview demo record.

name: Park Guell
description: Park Guell mixes public outdoor space, design details, and city views in a compact visit window.
